title: Create comprehensive AI Cockpit review implementation plan

sources.reason: Defines the three review objects, conclusions, priorities, and proposed remediation items.
Defines the Work Item lifecycle, verification loop, and fail-closed rules.
Defines canonical governance terminology used by the plan.
Defines repository-specific Work Item, review, release, and closure requirements.

problemStatement: The review identifies multiple independent governance gaps across the template repository, adopter upgrade lifecycle, and human-agent decision handoff; implementers need an ordered, auditable execution plan.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Plan covers all three review objects and their boundaries
Plan enforces repeated Work Item lifecycle and fail-closed pause
Plan ends implementation with release and post-release cleanup

riskAssessment.reason: The review spans template maintenance, adopter upgrades, human-agent handoff, and release governance; the plan must preserve one independently verifiable Work Item per remediation item.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly confirmed the plan design, authorized the requested repository workflow actions, and requested execution.

preReviewWarnings: This Work Item creates a plan only; it does not implement the 17 remediation Work Items.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The plan records agreement with the review conclusions and separates template maintenance, adopter projects, and human-agent collaboration; evidence is the plan's 评审结论 section.
The plan lists the remediation Work Items in priority and dependency order, ending the implementation sequence with release of a new version; evidence is the plan's 工单总表 section.

The plan requires a repeatable loop for every Work Item, explicit authorized actions, fail-closed handling, and cleanup of the plan document only after all implementation Work Items are complete; evidence is the plan's 执行循环与授权 section.
The plan contains a final Work Item for publishing a new version and a subsequent cleanup Work Item for deleting the plan document after completion; evidence is the plan's 工单 17 and 工单 18 sections.
guidelines: Keep the plan language-neutral and project-neutral where the template is intended for adopters.
Do not combine independent remediation Work Items on one branch or in one PR.
Do not claim two-person review or cryptographic release trust where it is not evidenced.
Do not delete the plan document until all implementation Work Items and the release Work Item are complete.

intent.problem: The review identifies multiple independent governance gaps across the template repository, adopter upgrade lifecycle, and human-agent decision handoff; implementers need an ordered, auditable execution plan.
constraints: Work must remain one Work Item, one dedicated branch, and one PR per remediation item.
The release Work Item must be the final implementation item.
The plan document must be cleaned up only after all listed implementation items are complete.
The user's authorization covers the requested branch, commit, PR, merge, release, and cleanup workflow actions within this scope.
intent.rationale: A dependency-ordered loop makes the review actionable while preserving fail-closed evidence and the distinction between template truth, adopter calibration, and human decisions.

approvalEvidence.reason: The user explicitly authorized execution, final release, and post-completion plan-document cleanup.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly confirmed the plan design and authorized execution, including the final release and post-completion plan-document cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore the plan document and its Work Item evidence; do not delete historical archived evidence.
